name: cite-or-decline rejects a stack-add of a namespace that is not in the rule surface
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload x --stack-add bogusns --classify 2>e.err; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'invalid=bogusns reason=unknown-namespace' e.err && echo unknown-ns-rejected 1>&2
